# GitHub Actions — avstängt

Inga aktiva workflows i detta repo (2026-06-19).

Arkiv: [`docs/archive/github-actions-2026-06-19/`](../../docs/archive/github-actions-2026-06-19/)

**Deploy:** manuell gate + Firebase CLI — [`docs/CI-HOSTING.md`](../../docs/CI-HOSTING.md)

**Valfritt (GitHub UI):** Repo → Settings → Actions → General → **Disable actions** (stoppar billing helt).
